scenarios.name: Specific Performance of Sale Agreement

checks.detail: Specific Relief Act / specific performance cited
At least one statutory section cited
Prayer for execution of sale deed
No invented amounts (10L/50L never in facts)

scenarios.draft_text:
IN THE COURT OF THE Civil Judge (Senior Division)
AT Bengaluru

O.S. No. __________ / 20____

Anita Sharma,
Aged about 52 years,
Occupation: {{PLAINTIFF_OCCUPATION}},
Residing at: Indiranagar, Bengaluru.

                                                        ... PLAINTIFF

                    VERSUS

Rajesh Reddy,
Aged about 60 years,
Occupation: {{DEFENDANT_OCCUPATION}},
Residing at: HSR Layout, Bengaluru.

                                                        ... DEFENDANT

SUIT FOR SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE OF CONTRACT WITH COSTS

MOST RESPECTFULLY SHOWETH:

JURISDICTION

1. The Plaintiff is a person sui juris and competent to institute this suit. The Defendant is a person sui juris and can be sued.
2. This Hon'ble Court has jurisdiction to try this suit under Section 16 of the Code of Civil Procedure, 1908, as the suit property is situated within Bengaluru. The suit is filed in the Court of the lowest grade competent to try it, and the suit value is within the pecuniary limits prescribed for this Court.

LIMITATION

3. The suit is within limitation under Article 54 of the Schedule to the Limitation Act, 1963, the period prescribed being three years from the date on which the contract was broken. The suit is filed well within the prescribed period.

FACTS OF THE AGREEMENT

4. On 10.01.2024, the Plaintiff entered into an Agreement to Sell with the Defendant for purchase of residential flat No. 302, 3rd Floor, Sunshine Apartments, Koramangala, Bengaluru, measuring 1200 sq ft, for a total consideration of Rs. 85,00,000/-. The said Agreement is annexed as Annexure A.
5. Pursuant to the Agreement, the Plaintiff paid an advance of Rs. 25,00,000/- via RTGS (UTR: HDFC20240110987654) on the date of agreement. The receipt is annexed as Annexure B.
6. The balance consideration of Rs. 60,00,000/- was agreed to be paid on or before 10.07.2024 against execution of the sale deed.
7. The property is free from encumbrances and the Defendant is the absolute owner entitled to sell the same.

PLAINTIFF'S READINESS AND WILLINGNESS

8. The Plaintiff has always been and continues to be ready and willing to perform her part of the contract.
9. The Plaintiff has arranged the balance consideration of Rs. 60,00,000/- and is ready to pay the same upon execution of the sale deed.

DEFENDANT'S REFUSAL TO PERFORM

10. On 05.06.2024, the Defendant sent a letter refusing to execute the sale deed, claiming he received a higher offer. The said letter is annexed as Annexure C.
11. The Plaintiff issued a legal notice dated 20.06.2024 calling upon the Defendant to execute the sale deed. The notice with postal receipt is annexed as Annexure D.
12. The Defendant failed to comply with the legal notice and refused to perform the contract.

LEGAL BASIS

13. The Plaintiff is entitled to specific performance under Section 10 of the Specific Relief Act, 1963, as the contract is valid and enforceable.
14. Under Section 16 of the Specific Relief Act, 1963, the Plaintiff has performed or is ready and willing to perform the essential terms of the contract.
15. The contract is valid under Section 10 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872, being free from coercion, fraud, or misrepresentation.
16. The Plaintiff is also entitled to protection under Section 53A of the Transfer of Property Act, 1882, having acted in reliance on the contract.

CAUSE OF ACTION

17. The cause of action first arose on 05.06.2024 when the Defendant refused to execute the sale deed.
18. The suit is governed by Article 54 of the Limitation Act, 1963, and is filed within the prescribed period of three years.

VALUATION AND COURT FEE

19. The suit is valued at Rs. 85,00,000/- (Rupees Eighty Five Lakhs Only) for the purpose of jurisdiction and court fee.
20. The requisite court fee of {{COURT_FEE_AMOUNT}} has been paid under the {{COURT_FEE_ACT_NAME}}.

PRAYER

21. In the premises aforesaid, the Plaintiff most respectfully prays that this Hon'ble Court be pleased to:
(a) Pass a decree for specific performance of the Agreement to Sell dated 10.01.2024;
(b) Direct the Defendant to execute the sale deed in favour of the Plaintiff upon payment of balance consideration;
(c) Direct the Defendant to deliver vacant and peaceful possession of the suit property to the Plaintiff (if not already in possession);
(d) In the alternative, award compensation under Section 21 of the Specific Relief Act, 1963 in lieu of or in addition to specific performance, at such amount as this Hon'ble Court deems fit;
(e) Award pre-suit interest if contract, usage, or substantive law permits, and award pendente lite and future interest under Section 34 CPC as this Hon'ble Court deems fit;
(f) Award costs of the suit to the Plaintiff;
(g) Grant such other and further relief(s) as this Hon'ble Court may deem fit and proper in the facts and circumstances of the case.

SCHEDULE OF SUIT PROPERTY

{{SCHEDULE_OF_SUIT_PROPERTY -- Address, Survey/Plot No., Extent/Area, Boundaries (East/West/North/South)}}

LIST OF DOCUMENTS

Annexure A — Original agreement dated 10.01.2024

Annexure B — RTGS receipt (UTR: HDFC20240110987654)

Annexure C — Defendant's refusal letter dated 05.06.2024

Annexure D — Legal notice dated 20.06.2024 with postal receipt

VERIFICATION

Verified at {{CITY}} on this the ____ day of __________ 20____.

I, {{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}, the Plaintiff above-named, do hereby verify that the contents of paragraphs 1 to 21 of this plaint are true and correct to my knowledge, and no material facts have been concealed therefrom, and that I have not filed any other suit, petition, or proceeding in any court or before any authority in respect of the same subject matter and cause of action.

DEPONENT

{{PLAINTIFF_NAME}}

PLAINTIFF

                                    THROUGH:
                                    {{ADVOCATE_NAME}}
                                    Advocate for the Plaintiff
                                    Enrollment No. {{ENROLLMENT_NO}}
                                    {{ADVOCATE_ADDRESS}}
                                    Mobile: {{ADVOCATE_PHONE}}
                                    Email: {{ADVOCATE_EMAIL}}
